text: The error `ErrSnapshotTemporarilyUnavailable` is defined in `raft/storage.go` (line 36-38) as a sentinel error returned by the `Storage.Snapshot()` interface method. The snapshot availability check during Raft log catch-up occurs in `raft/raft.go` in the `maybeSendAppend` method (line 446-459): when a leader cannot send log entries to a follower (entries are compacted), it attempts to send a snapshot via `r.raftLog.snapshot()`. That call goes through `raft/log.go`'s `raftLog.snapshot()` method (line 204-209), which delegates to `l.storage.Snapshot()`. If the storage returns `ErrSnapshotTemporarilyUnavailable`, the leader gracefully skips the snapshot send and retries later. These three files form the complete call chain for the snapshot availability check.
